title: Update icon images at three XPath locations based on uploaded names

requirements.summary: Replace the icon image at XPath '/html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/div[8]/img[1]' with the uploaded 'Multiple Server Icon.png' image
acceptanceCriteria: The icon at the specified XPath displays the uploaded Multiple Server Icon.png image
The image is properly sized and rendered in the attack path diagram

file_operations.description: Update the icon type mapping to use the uploaded 'Multiple Server Icon.png' image file located at frontend/public/assets/Multiple Server Icon.png for the appropriate icon type (likely 'multipleServers' or similar). Ensure the image path is correctly referenced and the icon renders at the proper size within the attack path diagram.

If necessary, update the icon rendering logic to ensure icons using the uploaded Multiple Server Icon.png file display correctly at the XPath location specified. Verify that drag-and-drop functionality and icon placement behavior are preserved for this icon type.
